data.title: 国际服2024年圣诞叶渚特别视频
data.summary: [Kanna's Special Video Release] Kanna's made a special video just for our hardworking Sensei! Please
data.body:
[Kanna's Special Video Release]

Kanna's made a special video just for our hardworking Sensei!
Please hear out Kanna's sincere feelings on this quiet, snowy night.

➡️Watch Special Video: https://youtu.be/CrHmSHFpYl0
